title: Rovo: Create knowledge base articles with AI in Jira Service Management
description:
Ask Atlassian Rovo to transform your resolved tickets and recurring issues into high-quality knowledge base articles in Confluence. Rovo identifies high-impact topics and uses similar issues to generate technical drafts, reducing the manual effort of maintaining documentation. To get started with this change: Open Rovo Chat in Jira Service Management.
	Enter a prompt using the manage-knowledge-base skill, such as
